headline: Deere: Market Is Still Pricing A Tractor Maker, The Field Tells A Different Story
summary: Deere (DE) is shifting to high-margin precision agricultural software with recurring revenue. Read the full analysis here.

headline: Deere & Company (DE) Surged on Market Favour
summary: Madison Investments, an investment advisor, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Madison Large Cap Fund”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The Madison Large Cap Fund (Class I) declined 2.7% in the quarter, outperforming the S&P 500’s -4.33% return. The fund focuses on long-term capital appreciation. The quarter saw […]

headline: Deere: Better Floor, But The Buy Case Still Needs Proof
summary: Deere & Company remains rated Hold, as valuation leaves little margin of safety amid weak large ag demand. Click here to read this latest analysis of DE stock.
